name: anti-scam
description: Browser Extension, Android App (React Native), Backend API

scripts.sync:shared: npm --prefix packages/core run build:cjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.rmSync('apps/extension/scripts/shared',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync('apps/extension/scripts/shared',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('packages/heuristic.js','apps/extension/scripts/shared/heuristic.js');fs.copyFileSync('packages/core/dist/features.iife.js','apps/extension/scripts/shared/features.js');console.log('synced: heuristic.js(proven) + features.iife.js -> apps/extension/scripts/shared');"
